Home / Services / Emergency Electrical Repairs

Emergency Electrical Repairs

24/7 solutions for sparks, outages, and dangerous wiring issues.

When your lights flicker during a Plano thunderstorm or an outlet stops working in your Preston Hollow home, you need help fast. We arrive within 90 minutes with fully stocked trucks to diagnose and fix:

Common emergencies include tripped breakers in older McKinney homes, buzzing panels in Arlington ranches, and frayed wires in Dallas’ historic properties. Our team carries specialized tools to handle aluminum wiring common in 1970s builds.

Safety first: We’ll secure the hazard area, explain the problem in plain English, and provide temporary power solutions if needed. Before leaving, we test all nearby circuits to prevent collateral damage.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Immediate phone assessment to determine risk level
  2. 02 Step 2: On-site diagnosis with thermal imaging cameras
  3. 03 Step 3: Repair using materials rated for Texas heat
  4. 04 Step 4: Post-repair safety inspection

Benefits

  • Available during North Texas’ worst storms
  • No overtime charges for nights/weekends
  • Complimentary whole-home surge protector quote
  • Follow-up within 24 hours

Frequently Asked Questions

What constitutes an electrical emergency?

Any situation risking fire or shock—sparking outlets, burning smells, or complete loss of power in Dallas’ summer heat require immediate attention.

Do you service older homes with knob-and-tube wiring?

Yes, we safely update antique systems in areas like Winnetka Heights, often adding GFCI protection without compromising historic charm.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with emergency electrical repairs? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-ele-r92
